endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/automaticTuning/current
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/automaticTuning/current
endpoints.description: Update automatic tuning options on server.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
